name: com.nitrosend/mcp
title: Nitrosend
description: Optional stdio bridge for Nitrosend's remote MCP server

environmentVariables.name: NITROSEND_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Nitrosend API key for stdio bridge usage (starts with nskey_live_)

environmentVariables.name: NITROSEND_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional OAuth bearer token for the stdio bridge

environmentVariables.name: NITROSEND_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional MCP endpoint override (defaults to https://api.nitrosend.com/mcp)
